tasks.description: Phase reference files — seven files in references/, one per phase

work_packages.description: Author phase-0-concept.md: kernel-surfacing protocol (three moves + recognition criterion), section-sweep pattern, ungrounded-section handling, scribe register, concept template field rules.
Author phase-1-northstar-mockup-roadmap.md: abstraction-vs-instantiation split, medium-follows-surface, scene correspondence, re-instantiability, descent from concept, roadmap as Phase 1 sibling.
Author phase-2-release-activation.md: Phase 2 purpose, release as standalone product, binding quality standard as Phase 3 input, release-level test plan, schedule, executor roster, locus rule.
Author phase-3-architecture.md: Phase 3 purpose, inward-facing register, interrogator translation, descent from release, open questions format, out-of-scope section.

Author phase-4-spec.md: Phase 4 purpose, inward-facing register, descent from architecture, asset/reference coverage, Execution Configuration, spec-level test plan, Phase 5 terminal artifact structure.
Author phase-5-execution-planning.md: Phase 5 purpose, calibrator role, dual-artifact gate, eval suite as terminal artifact, work package file authoring, Todoist load operation.
Author phase-6-execution.md: Phase 6 purpose, supervisor gating, verdict routing, escalation routing, session walls, UAT boundary, operator touchpoints.

tasks.description: Outward-facing asset templates — six structural templates stamped into downstream projects

work_packages.description: Author concept-template.md: frontmatter schema, nine required body sections with field guidance, field rules.
Author northstar-template.md: frontmatter schema, four required body sections, field rules.
Author mockup-template.md: frontmatter schema, per-scene section structure, field rules.
Author roadmap-template.md: frontmatter schema, three required body sections, field rules.
Author release-template.md: frontmatter schema, seven required body sections, two stub sections, field rules.
Author test-plan-template.md: frontmatter schema, three required body sections, table schema, field rules.

tasks.description: Inward-facing asset authoring instructions — four guides for downstream Claude instances

work_packages.description: Author claude-md-template.md: authoring guide for downstream CLAUDE.md. Must address purpose, walls, operator touchpoints, escalation handling, credential dependencies, locus rule.
Author subagent-template.md: authoring guide for downstream .claude/agents/ files. Must address YAML frontmatter, description, tools, model, system prompt conventions, locus test, memory/state.

Author architecture-template.md: authoring guide for downstream architecture.md. Must address purpose, inward-facing register, descent from release, open questions format, out-of-scope, Phase 3 closes when.

Author spec-template.md: authoring guide for downstream spec.md. Must address purpose, inward-facing register, descent from architecture, asset coverage, Execution Configuration, Phase 5 terminal artifact structure, Phase 4 closes when.
